wts.description: Create a git worktree and tmux session
wts.template: Create a git worktree and tmux workspace for the current repository by running `~/.config/tmux/create_worktree_session.sh $ARGUMENTS`. Treat the first argument as the branch name and the optional second argument as the tmux window name. Reuse one tmux session per repository, add one window per feature/worktree, report the created worktree path plus tmux session/window names, and surface any failure clearly.
